body.p1: Official HOBC documentation for getting started, running a node, wallet safety, SHA256 mining, pool stats, ports, explorer usage, and CLI/RPC operations.
body.p10: Operator command examples for hobbyhashd, hobbyhash-cli, wallet checks, balances, peers, and shutdown.
body.p11: Clear answers for miners, node operators, wallet users, exchanges, and new HOBC users.
body.p12: Official listing information for exchanges and aggregators: genesis, supply, emission, checksums, seed nodes, and press kit.
body.p13: Use your browser search to find text in these managed documentation entries.
body.p2: What HobbyHash Coin is, who HOBC is for, and the safe first steps for new users.
body.p3: Receiving, sending, confirmations, encryption, backups, cold storage, and Windows download warnings.
body.p4: Full node setup, config, ports, logs, peers, sync checks, resync basics, and bootstrap status.
body.p5: SHA256 mining, solo mining, worker names, pool URLs, shares, difficulty, and payouts.
body.p6: Understand hashrate, accepted/rejected shares, best difficulty, luck, odds, and troubleshooting.
body.p7: Mainnet, testnet, and regtest ports with safe firewall and router guidance.
body.p8: Download safety, checksums, wallet backups, private keys, fake support, SSH, and RPC hardening.
body.p9: Search txids, block hashes, block heights, addresses, confirmations, difficulty, and mempool status.

meta.title: Docs
notice.1: These guides are written for hobby miners, home node operators, and wallet users. Always verify downloads with published SHA256 checksums before installing.
value.focus: SHA256 coin for hobby miners, home miners, solo miners, and small mining setups.
